title: Sun burning
description: This mod adds sun that's dealing damage to player and mobs. Unless they are below something and aren't exposed to sunlight
body:
## Sun burning
**Sun burning mainly adds sun that is dealing damage to player until he's not below something and isn't exposed to sunlight.** 

> It also adds **sun glasses that gives immunity to sun dealing any damage to player**.

>  Mod has two /gamerule commands. First command is "**/gamerule burnmobs**" if turned on true (deafult false)
Sun will do damage to other mobs not only the player. Second command is "**/gamerule burnInTheSun**" if turned on false (deafult true) Sun will do no damage to player.

> **In this mod you can manualy set difficulty of this mod by these 3 commands. /SunBurningDifficultyEasy** Sets Sun Burning difficulty to Easy, **/SunBurningDifficultyNormal** Sets Sun Burning difficulty to Normal _(default)_, **/SunBurningDifficultyHard** Sets Sun Burning Difficulty to Hard

***This mod can add some spice to your world. It can be funnier and cooler. There would't sadly be further updates to this mod beacuse my save file was deleted :(***
